div.class: w-100 bg-white border-bottom px-4 py-2 d-flex align-items-center shadow-sm
snippet-panel bg-white border-end p-3 shadow-sm d-flex flex-column
snippet bg-light border border-secondary border-opacity-25 rounded p-3 mb-3 d-flex align-items-center shadow-sm
div.title: Box

div.class: snippet bg-light border border-secondary border-opacity-25 rounded p-3 mb-3 d-flex align-items-center shadow-sm
div.title: Dynamic Field

div.class: snippet bg-light border border-secondary border-opacity-25 rounded p-3 mb-3 d-flex align-items-center shadow-sm
div.title: Table

div.class: snippet bg-light border border-secondary border-opacity-25 rounded p-3 mb-3 d-flex align-items-center shadow-sm
div.title: Text

div.class: snippet bg-light border border-secondary border-opacity-25 rounded p-3 mb-4 d-flex align-items-center shadow-sm
div.title: QR Code

button.class: btn btn-sm text-white text-uppercase fw-bold py-2 flex-grow-1
btn btn-sm text-white text-uppercase fw-bold py-2 flex-grow-1

div.class: snippet-panel bg-dark text-white border-end p-4 shadow-lg d-flex flex-column h-100

input.class: form-control form-control-sm bg-black text-white border-secondary border-opacity-25

select.class: form-select form-select-sm bg-black text-white border-secondary border-opacity-25

button.class: btn btn-sm text-white text-uppercase fw-bold py-2 flex-grow-1
btn btn-sm text-white text-uppercase fw-bold py-2 flex-grow-1

div.class: source-editor-header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between p-2 text-white small fw-bold
flex-grow-1 overflow-auto d-flex flex-column align-items-center py-4 bg-200
d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-4 sticky-top px-4 py-2 bg-dark rounded-pill shadow-sm border border-secondary border-opacity-25

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-light text-white border-secondary border-opacity-50 px-3

div.class: pagination-controls d-flex align-items-center gap-2 bg-black rounded-pill p-1

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-dark py-1 rounded-circle me-1
button.style: width: 28px; height: 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
width: 28px; height: 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

div.t-att-style: 'width: ' + (currentPaperFormat ? currentPaperFormat.page_width : 210) + 'mm; min-height: ' + (currentPaperFormat ? currentPaperFormat.page_height : 297) + 'mm; box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; transition: all 0.3s ease;'

div.style: position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55); z-index: 2000; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

div.p: All changes done to the report's structure will be discarded and the report will be reset to its factory settings.

div.class: d-flex align-items-start gap-3 mb-4 p-3 rounded-2

div.label: Include header and footer
div.span: Header and footer are shared with other reports which may be impacted by the reset.

div.div: Assets, Liabilities & Equity with computed totals
Revenue and expense sections with net total
Line items with qty, rate, amount and grand total

t.div: No columns added yet. Click "+ Add" above.

div.div: Customer scans → opens this document in the Odoo portal.
Encodes the document number. Staff scan to pull up records.
India — customer scans with GPay/PhonePe, amount pre-filled.
Write your own field path or URL. For developers.
Customer scans → downloads PDF version of this report.

button.class: btn btn-xs btn-outline-secondary py-1 px-2 text-nowrap

div.div: Portal link not available for this report type. Switching to Plain reference.

div.label: Access token
div.div: Note: No token method found for this model.

div.label: UPI VPA
div.div: Set your UPI VPA in Settings → Company → Accounting first.
When printed, the QR will point to this specific report instance.

div.class: position-absolute inset-0 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center bg-white bg-opacity-75

i.class: fa fa-unlink fa-2x text-danger opacity-25 mb-1

div.div: Preview unavailable — will render correctly at print time.

select.title: Higher = more reliable scan but larger QR. Use H for small sizes or printed on textured paper.

div.class: position-absolute end-0 top-100 mt-1 small opacity-50

button.t-att-title: state.qr.step === 2 and state.qr.errors.hasErrors ? 'Fix the errors above first.' : ''
